topic: A person tying a Bowline knot with a thick rope, hands-only close-up.

parsed_generation.script:
Shot 1 [00:00-00:02]: Close-up: Hands form the Bowline's initial loop around the thick rope.
Shot 2 [00:02-00:05]: Side-angle: The working end threads up through the loop and around the standing part.
Shot 3 [00:05-00:08]: Top-down: The rope end passes back through the loop, around the standing part, and the knot tightens into a secure Bowline.
parsed_generation.narration: Hands-only sequence shows the Bowline forming from loop to finished knot in eight seconds. The three shots—Close-up, Side-angle, and Top-down—progress through the grip, pass, and tighten.
